---
title: "First Blog"
author: "Zhaoshan Duan"
date: "3/24/2021"
output: 
  html_document
  md_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

# Why 

While I doubt anyone beside myself will read this blog,

Is this a blog ? Is this a diary ? Or is this a place for me to self-check my sanity after more than one year of staying at home.
